toggle_stereo_on_off.title: Toggle Stereo System
toggle_stereo_on_off.desc: Toggles the stereo system on or off

next_track.title: Next Track
next_track.desc: Hold down to toggle on and off the stereo system or tap to play the next track

previous_track.title: Previous Track
previous_track.desc: Hold down to toggle on and off shuffle mode or tap to restart the current track or play the previous one

toggle_shuffle_on_off.title: Toggle Shuffle Mode
toggle_shuffle_on_off.desc: Toggles shuffle mode on or off

scan_for_new_tracks.title: Find New Tracks
scan_for_new_tracks.desc: Scans for tracks that have been added to the music folder
